name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Vote-by-mail, General Flynn's case, Kimberly Guilfoyle and more...
body:
Don't miss these segments from last week.

http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F6076399a6df3%2Fvote-by-mail-general-flynns-case-kimberly-guilfoyle-and-more&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193 Share (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F6076399a6df3%2Fvote-by-mail-general-flynns-case-kimberly-guilfoyle-and-more&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193)
http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Vote-by-mail%2C+General+Flynn%27s+case%2C+Kimberly+Guilfoyle+and+more...:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F6076399a6df3%2Fvote-by-mail-general-flynns-case-kimberly-guilfoyle-and-more Tweet (http://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=Vote-by-mail%2C+General+Flynn%27s+case%2C+Kimberly+Guilfoyle+and+more...:&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193 https%3A%2F%2Fmailchi.mp%2F6076399a6df3%2Fvote-by-mail-general-flynns-case-kimberly-guilfoyle-and-more)
http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9e31ba9289&e=f6564bbe3b Forward to Friend (http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9e31ba9289&e=f6564bbe3b)

** Race relations and cancel culture, the latest in General Flynn's case, 2020 elections and more...
------------------------------------------------------------
I added a poll of the week question below- check it out!

We had some great segments last week on Spicer&Co - Deputy Assistant to the President, Ja'Ron Smith (https://youtu.be/NYqop9ZXjKE?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) joined us to discuss the White House's efforts on race relations and support for black communities. Alan Dershowitz (https://youtu.be/IBY3eHA44fg?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) and KT McFarland (https://youtu.be/VqF7i1qBBZk?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) were with us to break down the latest in General Flynn's case and what will come next. For an update on the Trump campaign's fundraising and finances, Kimberly Guilfoyle (https://youtu.be/20xhaFOx_Rk?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) broke it down. Chairman of the NRCC Tom Emmer (https://youtu.be/jwYOOGelu34?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) and Congresswoman Elise Stefanik (https://youtu.be/UsOoWWK5-LU?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) highlighted the record breaking number of women running for Congress from the GOP. CJ Pearson (https://youtu.be/a5X-lukcIgs?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) is a great kid and is definitely going places, and he shared his inspiring work to raise money for communities and businesses that need rebuilding. We ended the week with a fun segment we call "The Company
Quiz" (https://youtu.be/KHcjHVyy5hY?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) - check it out and see how you do against our Company. Check out each of the segments on my YouTube page (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) .

I put up a video breaking down the difference between voting by mail absentee and sending ballots to every voter. Some states are sending ballots to every voter, but in every state you can vote absentee by mail, and I explained down the important differences. Check it out here (https://youtu.be/KHcjHVyy5hY?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) and let me know what you think.

Make sure you subscribe to my YouTube channel (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFEzUWbuym-nBZUSFkvJf4w?view_as=subscriber&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) to stay up to date on all the great segments from "Spicer&Co" and videos like the one on Trump rallies (https://youtu.be/xktIVWccUD4?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) and vote by mail (https://youtu.be/KHcjHVyy5hY?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) .

“Spicer&Co” is back every night this week at 6p and 9p on Newsmax, this week we will be joined by Dr. Seb Gorka, Senator Rick Scott, Newt Gingrich and more. I hope you'll set your DVR and tune in! Find your channel here (https://seanspicer.com/spicer-co/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) .

Leading America

In my second book "Leading America", I take a deep dive into my journey on Dancing with the Stars and some of my experiences with the media, education, big tech and corporate America since leaving the White House. It's even more clear to me now that President Trump's policies are what we need to move our country forward.

It comes out October 13, 2020, but you can pre-order on Amazon now.

Pre-order it now here (https://www.amazon.com/Leading-America-Commitment-Patriotism-Capitalism-ebook/dp/B084MDY19D/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=leading+america&qid=1588613239&sr=8-1&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) !

Check out this week's poll on my website -

** Has cancel culture gone too far? In the past week there have been calls to cancel: Yale's name, the phrase "master bedroom," President Woodrow Wilson, Elmer Fudd's gun in the Looney Toons, Teddy Roosevelt, Eskimo Pies and more.
------------------------------------------------------------
Weigh in here (http://seanspicer.com/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) !

** Join the Fight Against Pancreatic Cancer
------------------------------------------------------------

This month I've teamed up with Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. (https://www.pancan.org/get-involved/pancreatic-cancer-awareness/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193)

In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer (https://seanspicer.com/giving-back/?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk was virtual. So instead you can get a Cameo (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) shoutout from me and the proceeds will go to my team, "The Spice is Right" we've raised almost $3,000 so far, thank you! Find my team here (https://secure.pancan.org/site/TR/PurpleStride/PurpleStride?team_id=26655&pg=team&fr_id=1942&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) !

Check out Cameo here (https://www.cameo.com/seanspicer?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) and learn more about PanCan here (https://secure.pancan.org/site/TR/PurpleStride/PurpleStride?team_id=26655&pg=team&fr_id=1942&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=9e31ba9289-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_29_03_13&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-9e31ba9289-68212193) .

Thanks,

Sean

============================================================

In the past week there have been calls to cancel: Yale's name, the phrase "master bedroom," President Woodrow Wilson, Elmer Fudd's gun in the Looney Toons, Teddy Roosevelt, Eskimo Pies and more. Weigh in here () ! Join the Fight Against Pancreatic Cancer This month I've teamed up with Cameo () , an app that creates personalized shoutouts for birthdays, anniversaries, etc. to raise money for The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network. () In 2016 I lost my father to pancreatic cancer () , so supporting PanCan in their fight for a cure is a cause close to my family. For the last several years I've captained a team to walk in the annual PurpleStride 5k, but this year because of coronavirus the walk was virtual. So instead you can get a Cameo () shoutout from me and the proceeds will go to my team, "The Spice is Right" we've raised almost $3,000 so far, thank you! Find my team here () ! Check out Cameo here () and learn more about PanCan here () . Thanks, Sean ============================================================ Facebook () Twitter () Link () Website () Copyright © 2020 RigWil LLC, All rights reserved.

body:
Whether I’m at my pharmacies or just out running errands, people often ask how the campaign is going & what we’re doing to win on Election Day. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/defend-the-police-june-27-12504338?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=e0c289a044&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Hi friends,

You might have been wondering about this, too.

Whether I’m at my pharmacies for work or just out running errands in Dallas, people often ask how the campaign is going and what we’re doing this far out to win on Election Day.

The answer: Now is when we put the building blocks of a successful campaign in place.

To win in November, we need to campaign hard this summer and fall. That means we need to hire staff, mobilize volunteers, order handouts and lawn signs, and reserve advertising buys now.

So, will you give today? [Click here.](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=1ddc6cd28b&e=4f010155df)

We are __only one day away__ from our end-of-June fundraising deadline and we **must** meet our end-of-June goal to stay on track for the fall.

This deadline is an important one— since it's our first report of 2020, the media and my opponent will be watching closely to see if we hit our goal. [**Please contribute immediately to support our campaign >>**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7c08f35f35&e=4f010155df)
---
| Thanks for your help,
Will Douglas
_Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113_

Friend, All eyes are on NY-22 after our primary victory on Tuesday – and now it’s time for us to make sure we’re in position for another strong performance on November 3rd!
**I’m on a mission to Make Upstate New York Great Again in 2020.**
That means cutting red tape in Washington to let our small businesses thrive again, supporting our teachers as they continue to adapt to COVID-19, and fighting for our military and our veterans as they face unprecedented challenges at home and abroad.
**This is what NY-22 has been asking for – but Anthony Brindisi won’t listen.** [**HELP ME MAKE UPSTATE NEW YORK GREAT AGAIN**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3d9c0dc132ac412595645bb6b585ffb4&_e=yVACYjhVkcRORTEU8WGAVLsGAB2UHUxbu6JV7b44D2nqs-7wod08igI5AqxAV9bApB09vfYaC6vQJVXFHUJqVlPRjYJQgcWI_7bdykrDeP9W0KER8844x-dh19eyslkOeN8C7gwtKtnYFxIbq565OIZqF89J3b0BkY0NcvS6MXZS22-SlPRtgFfUJlzzrqGx20zrT2EkKyQXo-gU2CAGpVQqXWVG4s1saQiGuG9QFWpZkfGxSNXIqXFnsqtwXxE8xkd5nyn-wbnExqyHZgNd1CQvhzbep4gXIdGCjx6UpPhdjFPwX_rWH-NKqrEjno8mrqq7M3EmqOrP2uRALaizgsWqVTxP6idtMVljr-fCoiF79pf3LzXyIW89EN8O8gozlcbIIFiMko5BSAW0on1XuDofrb-NWfqiIZ7VWuVIQzA5tJNyA1QCym1vw5bnwBAhh36hgu-jtJpSHbgvUAsGosHVAZrGqVMu7D506UdA4kw%3D) Anthony Brindisi has sold out our district to Governor Cuomo’s and Nancy Pelosi’s liberal agendas. He’s a voice for higher taxes, a stronger China, and socialized healthcare in Washington, and that’s the last voice we need in Congress at a time like this!
We just kicked off our marathon to the general election – and with our end of quarter fundraising deadline coming up on **June 30th at 11:59pm,** we have a chance to prove to the rest of the country that NY-22 will be a part of flipping the House and taking back Congress in 2020.
**Will you help me get rid of Anthony Brindisi so we can take back Congress this year?** [**HELP ME MAKE UPSTATE NEW YORK GREAT AGAIN**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=3d9c0dc132ac412595645bb6b585ffb4&_e=yVACYjhVkcRORTEU8WGAVLsGAB2UHUxbu6JV7b44D2nqs-7wod08igI5AqxAV9bApB09vfYaC6vQJVXFHUJqVlPRjYJQgcWI_7bdykrDeP9W0KER8844x-dh19eyslkOeN8C7gwtKtnYFxIbq565OIZqF89J3b0BkY0NcvS6MXZS22-SlPRtgFfUJlzzrqGx20zrT2EkKyQXo-gU2CAGpVQqXWVG4s1saQiGuG9QFWpZkfGxSNXIqXFnsqtwXxE8xkd5nyn-wbnExqyHZgNd1Lcu9nDsdbJeLpz9wFyRms2fBFz6OI8uPGyGTyQJdD1htVA_3eyBksJSB5kv7GUxS-q0BA2Aq4AaHNwqntuylsCCjhVq5Xrdh2sHXdT777nAcYhmRcHQ97LNUKWWSSZ-sj60NfPI02C5QKrP3pKVlCqe7JWgR3XSFzKBU7xK-FVpeFC2nQ6tC6Q_N1tR6ef55VCcsMnDoO53LbhHHJEMVg0%3D) Upstate New York needs this, Congress needs this, and America needs this. body:
I need to know that you’re all in on building One Indiana with me. I can’t do it alone. friend, Did you get a chance to read my team’s email?
I told you earlier this month — the best is yet to come for Indiana. We’re going to bounce back from the COVID-19 pandemic stronger than ever before and trust me, we’ll keep setting records.
But I need to know that you’re all in on building One Indiana with me. I can’t do it alone.
That’s why I’m reaching out right now. friend, will you sign our One Indiana pledge and (if you can) donate $10 to help us with this mission? Use the link below.
**[https://secure.holcombforindiana.com/action-1318148/One-Indiana-Pledge/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=46c55163471842c6a9f38a0b8278526b&_e=hizufS1NeLtRLK-TfKtfJ2n-mnOcxNSYhV89sQZFEkct36BREQlPH_pXxk2Wh1KA7s3miJ0pnA7mxcFik9nDIa_YhAmotdoYKiRydA_Dzby94yh85QfilEHpgzYuHCuKb3VvkKkkACFwtU3NH-_eaQ62chzE1-3WkDJi1J3cXGB0K8z3ep72uE627CsJ8nFJGOoZL2P-EwNvKA37VEMveUPU_ruV9-hWKEwBewCfwXHvKvNxxGeUOYn_MSr_Hm66iSokSVooDWiHHjBLRktnDvW6_10_OV9XmqCZz-CCB-n2uqAm487q1NJHZc0nqA78QfFs-scmYL9Bdu-h6fnusy3VYO39N-rg016L-0Bpvlai1LD8GRRH3r3780vB97T92Nb4hyXnuQ7t5qxdLgKYlAHmoHYF5-PfuOeoILPq5H1A3K9BBW4_k6Cm_tAw5uwzDk3TVoxSszaHFgcXK3Juq5WSUKW_9J6OlO5wQxAYZWk%3D)**

friend,

Eric laid out his vision of One Indiana at the 2020 Indiana Republican Convention last week, and he made one thing crystal clear.

**The best is yet to come for Hoosiers across Indiana. **

_Before the COVID-19 pandemic, we set records for job creation, wages, international investment in our state, and investments in our roads and bridges. We lowered the infant mortality rate, fought the drug epidemic, expanded education, and much more. _

_And trust us, we’ll be setting records again before you know it. _

We have work ahead of us to truly become One Indiana — but we know that Hoosiers love a challenge. We need to get back to work, create more jobs, raise wages, improve schools, build better roads, and much, much more.

We can’t turn back the clock — we need to move forward.

And to do that, we need your help. friend, we need you to be all in.

That’s why this quarter, we’re asking you to join us on our mission to build One Indiana.

**[friend, will you chip in just $10 and commit to building One Indiana with Eric over the next four years? We’re asking you to put some skin in the game and help Eric continue to set records for another four years.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=46c55163471842c6a9f38a0b8278526b&_e=hizufS1NeLtRLK-TfKtfJ2n-mnOcxNSYhV89sQZFEkct36BREQlPH_pXxk2Wh1KAaCYdYETBrxvv4NorO-R6_va8quNbIc8jYcI1ZILWstBpxEVIBUhHoTYAUJ2-gJGkFfhc-P3e-LBKKhTCcyenMNcIJiXVEv6XL809MRBpWARSRNmNGqppECRleSjbKjprA5scYJhU3Hm-0ndNr335Bdeww4xDhQRqP9ZvPU0OMHmAmfohpndArJ71t42r_I8Vx7x8kb7q0t3mpfGqcjILWEv3tBz-HfvGF3w4JIY-DMebNO8aEYNjePIsr9WZleNlnh-Qr7TIPzrF5A0m3Aw0Ak-D_yBbq5tmmVfALXBYxnjEHDFp6UxA30hVURAU84taQJ0qXciCOk5Zz4IHDxcKGkHfV_l5DAFUaVJR-kfsT1iRYy4bDJt0Ou5wFH9oign79HAuo8A6Y363FTON-SeMHHjH4kVVM2u2ziI_g2jlFRKMeOUVby2g8l2R1s0s27Xt)**
[**Donate $10 and Sign Our Pledge**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=46c55163471842c6a9f38a0b8278526b&_e=hizufS1NeLtRLK-TfKtfJ2n-mnOcxNSYhV89sQZFEkct36BREQlPH_pXxk2Wh1KAaCYdYETBrxvv4NorO-R6_va8quNbIc8jYcI1ZILWstBpxEVIBUhHoTYAUJ2-gJGkFfhc-P3e-LBKKhTCcyenMNcIJiXVEv6XL809MRBpWARSRNmNGqppECRleSjbKjprA5scYJhU3Hm-0ndNr335Bdeww4xDhQRqP9ZvPU0OMHmAmfohpndArJ71t42r_I8Vx7x8kb7q0t3mpfGqcjILWKefH5JUV1j2gJSKww8awn-kSghC3pSK-GK7fiiIUnImx95eDwRjY929lvf2WH8N2az7ST6KMaecTto6fNVz4oGb1soPkschDmjqhpq87WpxyFpvOvKW3mQphw-ArGAF5TchE0S87DNHLiZZiYDssPDnemlAJCiNzvtq87I2T64OWPv1xAT_C5JBAlvcqvCd3Ntry4_ZI2F8KsAniK0r7TVtfU2Y938ps4_A0tA2-Iun)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR KANSAS
body:
We've been updating our files ahead of our huge FEC end-of-quarter deadline tomorrow and we wanted to give you a chance to see yours:
_Mayor De La Isla’s number one priority during this crisis is to slow the spread of COVID-19 in Kansas. In accordance with CDC guidelines, our campaign has canceled all in-person events, but we will continue engaging with voters and supporters online through email and social media. Thank you for reading and continuing to be part of our team._

Friends,

We've been updating our files ahead of our huge FEC end-of-quarter deadline tomorrow and we wanted to give you a chance to see yours:
**Q2 SUPPORTER RECORD FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com**

**Donor Status:** Non-Donor
**Suggested donation:** $10
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073398/215931926/977494464?gpsid=8_122_13647&refcode=em20_200629_eoq4_fnd_gq_ndn__tm_ettx&utm_campaign=em20_200629_eoq4_fnd_gq_ndn__tm_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=mdli&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTUzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzhiNzRmMC01Y2JhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cs9bi0C_4jXxlGzGrJ2de7w6qosoPTNU5TIgYx9wzy4=)
---

_Your supporter record is connected to your email address. If you've recently donated at an event or with a different email address, thank you! Your online record may not be up to date, but don't worry -- we update these records regularly._

We have just over 24 hours before the deadline and we're still coming up $4,188 short of our $60,000 goal. Michelle's race is going to be one of the closest in the country -- **that's why it was just named as one of only 24 districts for the DCCC's Red to Blue program.** We can't afford to fall behind on our fundraising for even a moment if we're going to send her to Congress to lift up the voices of all Kansans.

But Michelle isn't accepting any corporate PAC money. That means if we're going to close our fundraising gap and hit our goal by tomorrow at midnight, we need grassroots supporters like you to step up right away.

name: Margaret Good
subject: Re: Why we need Margaret
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends — I know Stephanie already reached out today so I’ll keep this short. Tomorrow at midnight we will face the toughest public filing deadline for our campaign. And thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we have hit every goal we’ve set so far — but we can’t stop this momentum.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073424/215932685/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2YzOS01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIHOIYpSyrQB651RPDcqx-qBmErRk6cga0EUuY29kkE=&emci=907ca9a3-10ba-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=28d87f39-5dba-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) Friends — I know Stephanie already reached out today so I’ll keep this short.

Tomorrow at midnight we will face the toughest public filing deadline for our campaign. And thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we have hit every goal we’ve set so far — but we can’t stop this momentum.

We set a goal of raising $20,000 online in June, and in order to reach that, I need everyone reading this to make a contribution.

What we report will be used by the GOP, the media, and pundits to gauge our likelihood of flipping this seat from red to blue, and we cannot fall short — use this link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/margaretgoodfl16](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073425/215932686/1073285021?refcode=em06292020PM&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2YzOS01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIHOIYpSyrQB651RPDcqx-qBmErRk6cga0EUuY29kkE=)**

See below for more information on why EMILY’s List is excited about flipping this district.

Thanks so much,

Margaret

**\---Forwarded Message---**

Hi Friend,

As the president of EMILY’s List, I couldn’t be more excited to reach out to you about the opportunity to flip a seat in Southwest Florida.

Given her record, we already know that Margaret will be a strong voice for every community in Florida’s 16th District. And she will bring the same leadership to Congress that has guided her community work prior to serving in public office.

Margaret’s strong record of running — and winning — means that she is ready to step up and take on an entrenched Republican incumbent with a record of hurting the communities he purports to represent.

**[In just 48 hours, Margaret’s facing the toughest public filing deadline yet of her campaign. Can you donate $15 or more to her campaign today to make sure she finishes this quarter in the strongest position possible?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073426/215932687/1073285021?refcode=em06292020PM&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2YzOS01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIHOIYpSyrQB651RPDcqx-qBmErRk6cga0EUuY29kkE=)**

Republicans are doing everything they can to win, and with all eyes on Florida, we have to make sure Margaret knows we’re on her side. Vice President Pence has already paid a visit to the District — so we know the GOP is worried.

In 2018, EMILY’s List helped a record-breaking number of women get elected to Congress — and with your help, we can keep building on that success.

**[Please, make a contribution today to ensure Margaret has what it takes to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073427/215932688/1073285021?refcode=em06292020PM&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2YzOS01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIHOIYpSyrQB651RPDcqx-qBmErRk6cga0EUuY29kkE=)**

Thank you for your support,

Stephanie Schriock
EMILY’s List President
| ****[Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073428/215932689/1073285021?refcode=em06292020PM&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2YzOS01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIHOIYpSyrQB651RPDcqx-qBmErRk6cga0EUuY29kkE=)****

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073429/215932690/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2YzOS01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIHOIYpSyrQB651RPDcqx-qBmErRk6cga0EUuY29kkE=)**

If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073430/215932691/192916899?contactdata=i8ipSU4dY1Qo6qUGMwcH1uADLLP3hYu50V0euc7IYRWcWjHCc5MGKWhcCafrnp9r&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGQ4N2YzOS01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIHOIYpSyrQB651RPDcqx-qBmErRk6cga0EUuY29kkE=&emci=907ca9a3-10ba-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=28d87f39-5dba-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

Friends — I know Stephanie already reached out today so I’ll keep this short. Tomorrow at midnight we will face the toughest public filing deadline for our campaign. And thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we have hit every goal we’ve set so far — but we can’t stop this momentum. We set a goal of raising $20,000 online in June, and in order to reach that, I need everyone reading this to make a contribution. What we report will be used by the GOP, the media, and pundits to gauge our likelihood of flipping this seat from red to blue, and we cannot fall short — use this link to contribute: = See below for more information on why EMILY’s List is excited about flipping this district. Thanks so much, Margaret \---Forwarded Message--- Hi Friend, As the president of EMILY’s List, I couldn’t be more excited to reach out to you about the opportunity to flip a seat in Southwest Florida. Given her record, we already know that Margaret will be a strong voice for every community in Florida’s 16th District. And she will bring the same leadership to Congress that has guided her community work prior to serving in public office. Margaret’s strong record of running — and winning — means that she is ready to step up and take on an entrenched Republican incumbent with a record of hurting the communities he purports to represent. = Republicans are doing everything they can to win, and with all eyes on Florida, we have to make sure Margaret knows we’re on her side. Vice President Pence has already paid a visit to the District — so we know the GOP is worried. In 2018, EMILY’s List helped a record-breaking number of women get elected to Congress — and with your help, we can keep building on that success. = Thank you for your support, Stephanie Schriock EMILY’s List President | **= | Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, ** If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY MARGARET GOOD FOR CONGRESS Margaret Good for Congress PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States

| _Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.

Please visit our [COVID-19 community resource guide](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073466/215935003/-466961882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTA5YjJlZi01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BBTZS0JY3vUDf2MGiOHa6VeEdFm8v6SU0AzNz-fa44I=&emci=1df210d2-57ba-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=4109b2ef-5dba-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=14145524) to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe._

Hi friend,

Growing up in San Antonio as the son of a civil rights leader, I saw my mother’s dedication to civic duty in her community -- and it inspired me to pursue public service in my own life.

I’m proud to fight for Texas families the way my mother fought for ours, and I’m proud to be a part of the fight to flip Texas blue.

[**That's why I’m proud to endorse Sri Preston Kulkarni for Congress, and why I’m asking for your support to get him across the finish line in November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073467/215935004/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.29_JC_b2_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTA5YjJlZi01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BBTZS0JY3vUDf2MGiOHa6VeEdFm8v6SU0AzNz-fa44I=)

Sri’s lifetime of dedication to service has prepared him to represent all those living in TX-22. From his difficult decision to pause his college education to become the family caregiver after his father’s passing, to his decades of experience in the Foreign Service as a diplomat, **Sri has the character and strength to bring real change to Texas.**

In Sri’s 2018 campaign, he engaged the diversity of his district and brought in enough new voters to make his race the closest since then-incumbent Pete Olson was first elected. **He proved he knows how to build the coalitions we need to flip Texas blue.**

[**I am confident that Sri will flip TX-22 blue this November, and with your help we can send a representative to Congress who has the best interests of his community at heart. Chip in now to help send Sri to Congress >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073473/215935010/2147176479?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.29_JC_b2_all&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTA5YjJlZi01ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BBTZS0JY3vUDf2MGiOHa6VeEdFm8v6SU0AzNz-fa44I=)

In November, we have a shot at flipping Texas blue. We have impressive local and statewide candidates all over Texas with plans to reduce the cost of prescription drugs, improve Social Security, and fight for a more equitable future for our children. While the Republicans in TX-22 are focused on division, extremism, and selling out their potential constituents for Republican PAC money, **Sri has demonstrated his ability to build a campaign focused on the issues at stake for TX-22’s families -- and his determination to bring the common-sense reforms we need to solve these problems.**

All we need to do is get to work and elect him.

Thank you,

\--Julián Castro

clean_body: Dear Peter, Nobody ever wants to look back and wish they had done more, and this election is no different. That’s why our team has been working OVERTIME to win. But at the end of the day, your vote is what will truly decide the results of this race! We can be successful, but now, more than ever, we need your support, both at the ballot box and today, ahead of tomorrow's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline! David Hill will be a voice for our values in Congress, but we need to make our voices heard for him first. Tomorrow is Election Day , and we’re all counting on supporters like you to have a voting plan in place. Gather your friends, family and neighbors, head to your nearest polling location, and vote for David Hill TOMORROW, Tuesday, June 30th! | | | Thank you for your support, Team Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | | | ---|---|---|---

Friend,
**The U.S. Supreme Court just announced a major victory for reproductive rights by ruling that TRAP (Targeted Regulations of Abortion Providers) laws have no merit when it comes to a woman’s right to choose. **
June v Russo centered on a Louisiana state law requiring abortion providers to have admitting privileges at a hospital within 30 miles — a requirement which is medically unnecessary and solely intended to limit the number of clinics in the state. Even though this is a tremendous victory for reproductive rights advocates, we must continue the fight for abortion rights!
Since Roe v. Wade, reproductive rights have been under attack by Republicans. Abortion rights are human rights. We must stand together to fight for reproductive justice.

| | Hello friends,

Tomorrow, Coloradans make their voices heard in our primary election.

My friend John Hickenlooper has led the city of Denver as Mayor and the state of Colorado as Governor. Now he’s running a strong, progressive campaign to be our state’s next United States Senator.

[The next 24 hours are crucial for John’s campaign — so he can head into the general election to defeat Cory Gardner and help us flip the Senate. And we need your help to do it!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18073739/215943897/1293729373?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062920_AC_NATL&amount=5&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjEzZmIyNi02MWJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TfLoPFNo4lScrSFNtNkvaukEa0OVtirg4_0owuQACw4=)

clean_body: We are rapidly approaching the June fundraising deadline. The far-left is watching closely and looking for every opportunity to make up ground in..... Peter We are rapidly approaching the June fundraising deadline. The far-left is watching closely and looking for every opportunity to make up ground in 2020 and beyond. I need your help, we are still $50,000 short of our goal for the month. Can you chip in to help us close the gap? As you know, Ohio was critical to President Trump winning in 2016 and to us maintaining our Senate majority. We need to send a strong message that Ohio is not up for grabs in 2020 and beyond. By hitting our deadline, we will do two important things: 1. We will show the far-left that Ohio is not up for grabs. 2. We will force the billionaires from New York and California to spend their money elsewhere. If we hit this goal it will send a strong message to the billionaire elites looking to influence Ohio. This is an important test for 2020 and I want to crush it. END OF QUARTER DEADLINE Email: Goal: $50,000 Days left: 2 days Status: Pending Remember, Ohio is a critical state this election and for our future. Do you want Chuck Schumer to take over the Senate and implement his far-left plans? Peter, I know you don’t, which is why I am counting on you to help us reach this critical goal. Sincerely, Rob Portman Paid for by Rob Portman for Senate

We've only got one more day until our FEC fundraising deadline, but we're still aiming to hit our goal. And we're counting on grassroots donors to help hit it.

Hitting this goal will mean we have the resources to continue fighting to put power in the hands of working people and elect Democrats up and down the ballot in November. But it's only going to be possible because top supporters chipped in to emails like this one.

**So we have to ask: If you are in a place where a contribution makes sense, can Elizabeth count on you to donate before tomorrow's midnight deadline?

[If you can, please chip in $2 or whatever you can to push Warren Democrats over the finish line before midnight tomorrow.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285250a3/45c30650/1ce038e3e/66e9bd99/1151239644/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bjIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNUzI4Rl9FT1FfR1JNX1RfMjAyMDA2MjlfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jun20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS28F_EOQ_GRM_T_20200629_V1S2_P")**

Warren Democrats

body:

| | Peter,

I'll keep this short, because I know your time is valuable.

I want to let you in on a secret: When the finance team or I ask for you to chip in to support this campaign, we're asking for more than money. **We're asking for you to take ownership of our grassroots movement and to build the momentum we'll need to elect Christy in November.**

See, our fundraising numbers are one of our best metrics for the enthusiasm behind Team Christy -- especially after critical fundraising deadlines like the one coming up on Tuesday, when our numbers become public for Mike Garcia and his rich Republican friends to see.

Christy isn't taking a cent from corporate PACs or D.C. lobbyists (unlike Garcia who is raising special interest money hand-over-fist). We're building this campaign one grassroots donation at a time -- and it's how we plan to hit our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal.

**[Our average grassroots gift this month is $21. If 994 people pitched in that much or more right now -- we'd hit our end-of-quarter goal. Can you be one of the grassroots donors we need? name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I’ll just be blunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Friend, Donald Trump barely lost Minnesota in 2016 — in fact, he was just 1.5 percentage points from flipping it. This time around, he'll be dumping truckloads of money into Minnesota to try to swing this election in his favor — and to get another lapdog in the Senate by replacing my good friend and colleague Tina Smith with Republican Jason Lewis. We can't let that happen. We need Tina in the Senate to fight back against health insurance companies, root out corruption, help students getting crushed by debt, and hold Wall Street accountable for hurting working people. I'll just be blunt: This will be a tough fight. Republicans have a network of dark money groups and super PACs at their every beck and call, and we know they like to play big-money politics because they're afraid of the grassroots energy we bring to the fight. And you know what? They should be. But we can’t just nibble away at their massive cash advantage. We need a grassroots movement to come through if we’re going to take on the right-wing special interests and win. So, when people like you and I fight alongside leaders like Tina, that's the most powerful political force in the country. That’s also why I’m asking: **If it makes sense for your budget, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to fight for Tina ahead of the most important end-of-quarter deadline of her campaign so far? We can’t leave any stone unturned — every dollar makes a difference in our work to save Minnesota's Senate seat and send Donald Trump packing this year.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18074737/215969309/-1478682376?refcode=tsm-em-200629&amounts=10,25,50,100,150,250,1000&firstname=&lastname=&email=&addr1=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTljN2RmOC02ZGJhLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TYKxuJRbyvspyobbCKjwWlcSwVO-Lpl0H2TALBIX7os=)

There's a whole lot on the line in this election — from winning back the White House to flipping the Senate. If Democrats play our cards right (and persist), we can do both, but our path gets steeper if we lose in Minnesota.
That's why your donation matters so much today.
Thanks for being a part of this,
— Elizabeth
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota

body:
Time's running out! | |
---
| | | Peter, | |
Did you see the email below from Genevieve? [We're on a tight deadline, and we need you on Genevieve's team!](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=d0788a91cb&e=68aaeb0998)

There are less than 36 hours left, and we're still short of our goal. So if you have not contributed, [we need your help now](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=163e8ed14d&e=68aaeb0998).

Thank you!

Rob Costello
Campaign Manager
---
|

Begin forwarded message:

From: Genevieve Collins <info@gcforcongress.com>
Date: Mon, Jun 29, 2020 at 10:00 AM
Subject: Are you on our team?
To: Rob Costello <info@gcforcongress.com>
---
|
---
|
---
| Rob,

I know your time is valuable, so I'm going to get straight to the point.

We've got an absolutely **critical end of quarter FEC fundraising deadline** coming up at 11:59PM Tuesday night, and **we're still $23,000 short of our goal. [Join our grassroots team of supporters and help close the gap right now >>](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=a3075e1924&e=68aaeb0998)**

**Nancy Pelosi has declared our district "ground zero,"** committing to flood Dallas TV stations with **over a million dollars of ads** , and there's likely more to come.

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=919c3f6ae0&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE $50")
---

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $500](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=1562631168&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE $500")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $1,000](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=6291afc1f0&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE $1,000")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $2,800](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=95536004df&e=68aaeb0998 "CONTRIBUTE $2,800")
---
| **Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and the progressive Democrats are shattering fundraising records** , and [it's up to grassroots conservatives like yourself](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=a8f1872584&e=68aaeb0998) to ensure that we have the resources to fight back.

**Can I count on you to[join us and help even the score?](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=193474059a&e=68aaeb0998)** Remember, we've got less than two days left until our deadline!

| Thank you and God bless,

|

name: John Lewis
subject: I'm Humbly Asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter, I'll cut to the chase: [**I 'm humbly asking you for $20 >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d03f8/72412298/4afdd707/6105d648/2815398388/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbGV3aXNfanVuZSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNjI5X0xld2lzU3Vycm9nYXRlX1UyX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_lewis_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+Irsquom+humbly+asking+you+for+ask+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2") As a young man, I marched to end Jim Crow segregation. Spilled blood on the bridge in Selma. Went to jail. And watched brave Americans die. All for basic rights. _**But hear me when I say I've never seen anyone more dangerous than this President.**_ I've watched this reckless Administration work to rip health care away from our most vulnerable Americans, abandon American values of peaceful protest, and rip immigrant children from their parents without a second thought. For those of us who shed blood to make this country what it is today, this President's behavior is an absolute affront -- [**so I 'm asking for your help to stop him.**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d03f8/72412298/4afdd707/6105d64b/2815398388/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbGV3aXNfanVuZSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNjI5X0xld2lzU3Vycm9nYXRlX1UyX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_lewis_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+so+Irsquom+asking+for+your+help+to+stop+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2") We badly need to elect Democrats. But I can't do it alone -- **I know better than anyone it takes a movement of people taking a stand.**
### **Peter, I wouldn 't ask if it wasn't so critical. Can you donate $20 to help me elect more Democrats?**

Decades after I marched in Selma, I'm watching injustice rear its ugly head again.
Since the day he took office, I've witnessed this President turn a blind eye to hatred in this nation and refuse to protect American citizens from violence and discrimination -- [**If you 're as furious as I am, will you donate $20 and join my fight?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d03f8/72412298/4afdd707/6105d5b0/2815398388/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbGV3aXNfanVuZSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNjI5X0xld2lzU3Vycm9nYXRlX1UyX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_lewis_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=9+-+If+yoursquore+as+furious+as+I+am+will+yo&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2")
After violence between neo-Nazis and good people in Charlottesville, I witnessed this President place equal blame on both sides. I simply won't stomach that -- [**If you can 't stomach it either, will you donate $20 and join me?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d03f8/72412298/4afdd707/6105d5b3/2815398388/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbGV3aXNfanVuZSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNjI5X0xld2lzU3Vycm9nYXRlX1UyX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_lewis_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=10+-+If+you+canrsquot+stomach+it+either+will+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2")
I watched this President rip newborn infants from their mothers' arms, put them into cages, and leave them separated for weeks on end. I refuse to let his reign of terror continue -- [**If you 're with me, will you donate $20?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d03f8/72412298/4afdd707/6105d5b2/2815398388/VEsHBA/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbGV3aXNfanVuZSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNjI5X0xld2lzU3Vycm9nYXRlX1UyX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_lewis_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=11+-+If+yoursquore+with+me+will+you+donate+as&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2")
I witnessed this President cower before a foreign adversary and invite further interference in our democratic process. I think our leaders should protect our country from all threats -- foreign and domestic -- [**Will you donate $20 if you agree?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d03f8/72412298/4afdd707/6105d5b5/2815398388/VEsHBw/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbGV3aXNfanVuZSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNjI5X0xld2lzU3Vycm9nYXRlX1UyX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_lewis_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=12+-+Will+you+donate+ask+if+you+agree&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2")
_He must be stopped. And we are the only people who can stop him._
If -- and only if -- we band together, will we save our democracy. None of us can do it alone. I know better than anyone it takes a movement of people taking a stand.
We're fighting for the very soul of our nation. I can't overstate the urgency of defending our Democracy against this dangerous President. [**If you 're ready to continue the fight, will you donate $20 and join me?**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d03f8/72412298/4afdd707/6105d5b4/2815398388/VEsHBg/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfbGV3aXNfanVuZSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJWUFBfRU1fRlJfMjAwNjI5X0xld2lzU3Vycm9nYXRlX1UyX1gyIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiMjAifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_lewis_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=13+-+If+yoursquore+ready+to+continue+the+figh&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200629_LewisSurrogate_U2_X2")

clean_body: | | Peter, I'll cut to the chase: "" As a young man, I marched to end Jim Crow segregation. Spilled blood on the bridge in Selma. Went to jail. And watched brave Americans die. All for basic rights. But hear me when I say I've never seen anyone more dangerous than this President. I've watched this reckless Administration work to rip health care away from our most vulnerable Americans, abandon American values of peaceful protest, and rip immigrant children from their parents without a second thought. For those of us who shed blood to make this country what it is today, this President's behavior is an absolute affront -- "" We badly need to elect Democrats. But I can't do it alone -- I know better than anyone it takes a movement of people taking a stand. Peter, I wouldn 't ask if it wasn't so critical. Can you donate $20 to help me elect more Democrats? | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Decades after I marched in Selma, I'm watching injustice rear its ugly head again. Since the day he took office, I've witnessed this President turn a blind eye to hatred in this nation and refuse to protect American citizens from violence and discrimination -- "" After violence between neo-Nazis and good people in Charlottesville, I witnessed this President place equal blame on both sides. I simply won't stomach that -- "" I watched this President rip newborn infants from their mothers' arms, put them into cages, and leave them separated for weeks on end. I refuse to let his reign of terror continue -- "" I witnessed this President cower before a foreign adversary and invite further interference in our democratic process. I think our leaders should protect our country from all threats -- foreign and domestic -- "" He must be stopped. And we are the only people who can stop him. If -- and only if -- we band together, will we save our democracy. None of us can do it alone. I know better than anyone it takes a movement of people taking a stand. We're fighting for the very soul of our nation. I can't overstate the urgency of defending our Democracy against this dangerous President. "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" Thank you, Congressman John Lewis "" | "" | | Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Leah=20Garrett?=
subject: Introducing Our New Campaign Manager
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=10e8e62430&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | **Please Welcome
Leah Garrett to the Campaign!**
---
|
---
| Hi Friend!

My name is Leah Garrett, and I’m excited to introduce myself as Pat’s new campaign manager. Pat’s campaign is showing real momentum after the primary. I’m ready to lead the effort to build on the energy you have created in order for this campaign to defeat Jackie Walorski in November.

The 2nd District needs a formidable leader who consistently shows up, is prepared, understands your concerns, and works to improve the quality of life for you and all Hoosiers.

That’s why I believe Pat needs to be the next member of Congress for Indiana-02. Her nearly forty years of service in this district as attorney, teacher, and small business owner uniquely prepare her for this role. I look forward to serving you, the voters of this district, as Pat’s campaign manager to make sure every voter in this district hears Pat’s message of Dignity and Justice for All.
---
| [STAND WITH ME →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ab95671aea&e=5886ca081d "STAND WITH ME →")
---
| **About Me**

Prior to joining Pat’s campaign, I worked on Amy Klobuchar’s presidential campaign in both New Hampshire and Arkansas leading teams of staffers and volunteers to build the on-the-ground campaign structure, organize events with Amy, and conduct voter outreach. In 2018, I was a Regional Field Director for the Virginia Democratic Party, where I oversaw field efforts in 27 counties.

I also attended the George Washington University’s Graduate School of Political Management where I received a Master’s in Political Management and Electoral Politics.

The main lesson I’ve learned throughout my experience in politics is that it’s critical to understand why people care about their community and why they participate in democracy.

[**June 30th is the all important end of quarter deadline where numbers raised will be noted by national organizations watching this race since winning the primary. Please consider making an investment right now to send the message that this is a people-powered campaign. Anything you’re able to give helps tremendously.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=586098ddc7&e=5886ca081d)
---
| [INVEST NOW →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8adf6f0752&e=5886ca081d "INVEST NOW →")
---
| [INVEST $25 IMMEDIATELY →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=2c42943bc7&e=5886ca081d "INVEST $25 IMMEDIATELY →")
---
| I’m excited to get to know you during this campaign. If you have any questions, please feel free to reply to this email.

In solidarity,

Leah Garrett
_Campaign Manager_
---

name: Dave Hoffman
subject: 24 hrs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
to go
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa13e/18d6a294/4c9cb6e7/26d7f1d1/3654781990/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Time is running out -- there are just over 24 hours left before the biggest FEC end-of-quarter deadline of our campaign yet. At the last end-of-quarter deadline, our opponent Bill Hagerty had already pulled in _**$200,000 from corporate PACs**_ , and was finalizing the paperwork for a _**multi-million dollar sweetheart loan**_ from his friends at the bank while small businesses struggled to get what they needed to make payroll during the pandemic. We don't have a war chest filled with corporate PAC dollars or sweetheart loans. James isn't taking**ANY corporate PAC money.** [_**Our campaign is built on small-dollar contributions from folks like you, and we 're relying on your support before this critical deadline. name: =?utf-8?Q?Future=20Generations=20PAC=2C=20Executive=20Director=20Roza=20Calderon?=
subject: What are you doing at 5pm tonght?
body:
If you aren't already busy, can you join us in calling voters? | | | | [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f8cefcef21&e=66979298f9)
---
| | |
---
|
## Are you available at 5pm tonight to join a last minute volunteer phonebank for Andrew Romanoff?
---
|
---
| [JOIN US TONIGHT AT 5PM](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=66f6a60137&e=66979298f9 "JOIN US TONIGHT AT 5PM")
---
| Hi Peter,

As I mentioned before FG is proud to endorse environmental champion Andrew Romanoff. Andrew is ready to take bold climate action with his **[comprehensive plan to combat the climate crisis](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=3732896398&e=66979298f9)**.

**We have just one day to get Andrew Romanoff across the finish line. I am writing to ask you to take 30 minutes of your time tonight to join with us to make critical calls to likely voters who have yet to turn in their ballot?**
---
| [ ](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=2f7bbdd548&e=66979298f9)
---
|
---
|
---
| _"We are honored to be endorsed by Future Generations. We're in lockstep with their seventh generation principle that the decisions we make today should result in a sustainable world seven generations into the future. We look forward to working side by side in our fight to save the planet with the Green New Deal.”_ \- Andrew Romanoff
---
| [JOIN US TONIGHT AT 5PM](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=7613abfaf4&e=66979298f9 "JOIN US TONIGHT AT 5PM")
---
|
---
| If you don't have facebook, you can join us at this Zoom link at 5pm PST: [https://us02web.zoom.us/j/8029335390?pwd=d3dKa2w0KzZVak9XT09vOHVEWXZXQT09](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=a7639ded9d&e=66979298f9)

---
| [JOIN US TONIGHT AT 5PM](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=f32f854b60&e=66979298f9 "JOIN US TONIGHT AT 5PM")
---
| |
---
It is an honor to work with Future Generations and youth across the country to ensure our leaders are standing up for Indigenous communities by building strong diplomatic relationships around the world and who understand that our relationship with the environment is undeniably interconnected with economic, racial, healthcare, and housing justice here at home. We must focus on policy that will deliver a sustainable and just world seven generations into the future.

Roza Calderon
Executive Director
[Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth](mailto:Roza@FutureGenerations.Earth)
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=c434c672fe&e=66979298f9)
---
| | [](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9eebc26d93&e=66979298f9)
---

---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2020 Future Generations PAC, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Future Generations PACPO Box 1861Olympia, WA 98507-2394
[Add us to your address book](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/vcard?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/profile?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Earth.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=94f5440de46d3dc73892719b6&id=9c2d36475c&e=66979298f9&c=8d8b752bdf).

name: Team Warner
subject: The Supreme Court was right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | **"The Supreme Court was right to uphold precedent and keep politicians out of women 's personal healthcare decisions."
-- Mark Warner** | [DONATE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c884842/202023061/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")
---
Derek,

The Supreme Court just issued a major decision today protecting women's reproductive rights. The 5-4 ruling means women's health care is safe from GOP attacks for the moment, but such a close decision means the work is far from over.

If they'd had their way, both Trump-appointed Supreme Court Justices, Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch, would have completely dismantled a woman's right to choose. Mark Warner opposed their nominations in the Senate, but with Senate Republicans trying to pack the courts with conservative Trump-appointed judges, he needs our help to keep up the fight.

**[The only way to stop them is to flip the Senate and the White House this November, and that starts by keeping Virginia blue. Will you chip in before tomorrow's end-of-quarter deadline and help Mark Warner win this November?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c884841/202023061/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c884840/202023061/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")
[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c88484f/202023061/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")
[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c88484e/202023061/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")
[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c88484d/202023061/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")
[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c88484c/202023061/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?express_lane=true&refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")
[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c88484b/202023061/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=express_lane_other")
Mark's new opponent is all in on the Trump GOP's efforts to turn back the clock on women's health care. He's made no secret that he would be a reliable vote for the President's extreme anti-choice judges. And he has attacked Mark repeatedly for his efforts to defend a woman's right to choose.

That's what Mark is up against this fall, and he needs our help to hold this Democratic Senate seat and make sure Virginia goes blue for Joe Biden this November.

**[Tomorrow is the first FEC deadline since Mark's Republican opponent secured the nomination. All eyes will be on our campaign, and we can't afford to come up short. Please, give what you can today to keep Virginia blue.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c88484a/202023061/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**

Thanks,
Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d41f/53d9897e/5459a1c0/1c884849/202023061/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYzNCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-juneeoq?refcode=20200629_f_1_nd__634__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

subject: your help is necessary

body:
As June draws to a close, I can’t help but look back at how huge of a month it has been for Team Scheller. Peter, As June draws to a close, I can’t help but look back at how huge of a month it has been for Team Scheller.
We have not only been endorsed by some top conservative leaders in the nation, but we also successfully clinched the Republican nomination to face Nancy Peosi’s ally, Radical Susan Wild.
But Peter, as our momentum has continued to increase, the Far-Left and their attacks continue to get worse. [**STOP THE RADICALS**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=fa5ca09cee12474483a7ee82bb60d319&_e=c2ewCpoV1UdWKG89cpjLrDSAejQOBD7z3GcLMg4joOdS4hbgYPLMvNNCfcJNxyT2UZQC7dbe6Z5A4l-sNcv4dakO3jSG2n4fZeiJUPR6TRhHkzYxRz9ND30uWSpgaVIMFgmr7nddTY9R0_SbJeK4n0c6HWlM2KSSmM-C8-ev3lFGDmio5iXdWBTo8xNx-2cCbfA69kcLzZQRbYghwFCew7vuRcRCTVRfbgQruTLAFzCTvAmflspd0IJBd0sQi9RAaysk2eqIdUeyGizoNqQGKt3lLY4wMYoxsYXKRxcrOJbU_X3mIEmsWL-SJgJ-BcQosOaZWCP7SfhzPAFBuexv0KKYPG0VNnvqRokWZB91swJTXzSLcmHzSEUf5n4_09HIbeX3fh1myymMlT0t6lEYrJG7SnZjr-VCyZYe9k9oOyWqNc7TaYU58ZaNk2QWGwY8) The last thing the Far-Left radicals want to see is the collectivism that has taken place the last few weeks over the simple idea that we cannot let a Radical, Far-Left Democrat continue to represent the Lehigh Valley.
She does not represent us.
It’s time to bring our conservative values to Washington--Not values comprised of increased taxes, sanctuary cities, and the Green New Deal.
Peter, this is the exact reason I’m reaching out to you right now -- to do something about the above potential reality. This all sits in our hands. WE have the very power through our donations and our votes to make a difference that will impact the Valley for many years to come.
As this quarter draws to a close and we report the past few month’s contributions to the FEC, will you double down on your typical donation to make sure that we keep this momentum rolling into the next few months to where we claim victory on November 3rd? This is a team effort, Peter. name: Hailey Barringer
subject: We can't sit this one out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
What we need to do in these final months before the election:
|
---

| | I know we've been emailing you a lot, but I promise: There's a light at the end of the tunnel. **There are just over _24 hours_ left until the FEC deadline!** As we enter these final months of the campaign before Election Day, we need to increase our voter outreach in a major way -- _but we might not be able to do that if we miss our goals._ **There 's too much at stake to sit this one out**. We have the opportunity to defeat dark money at the ballot box; to fight for health care, voting rights, and reproductive rights; to elect the first woman to represent the Triad; and to flip NC-06 for the first time in more than 30 years. [_**Are you in? If you are and if you 're able to spare a few dollars, chip in before midnight tomorrow.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ca/3d199a51/2f5bb8cb/7364d1db/2259529577/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYyOXBtIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ%3D%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200629pm?refcode=kme200629pm_m_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2ca/3d199a51/2f5bb8cb/7364d1db/2259529577/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDYyOXBtIiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ%3D%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200629pm?refcode=kme200629pm_m_other&refcode2=17426")

name: Greg Pence
subject: You won’t hear this on CNN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence for Congress |
body:
Democrats and the mainstream media are more unified than ever – and they’re doing everything they can to tear our country apart! [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=708d0779ef6e426fb5ca672086573e9d&_e=7fMLLXcz9lbL-FdeJLuoo390LGf8ID5NVFbFulNMm1OAeC1VmZrPcfq-3Bovg3VW5l1TDCVhTa-Ewafroa3_SPEDConMMmGYR3oobPHZQ18-9SSKFMOFl-nOPDbe8w_t9UfvYaj7KIZGVU4QmNBXzFY3Vq6kTIuXvlCi85nX_WafrObvycTVcvmSw2lslE-uUjQJC0tyyWpSBKrT0MPTqqcL0qc4wR5r_hwT3LtpxqPs6VTqXNJyDwqhxWVYveqljr9-KXsq6kxdMAcPfu6GJretxENFCmMBopulgd3Y7h3TQxN84L6j37qaaQpkI4StTqG8A11IRR0U1fc_YJZVFTdpm7_ZG0IKiHmJPfEbfYEc3mEDxQHhF-Xfa6EDFsDIe3Nz9T749W4PHzEBuQ7KZtjwoD3KdqE9qflrm2WOZ4M%3D) Friend, I’m going to cut right to the chase...
**Democrats and the mainstream media are more unified than ever – and they’re doing everything they can to tear our country apart!**
They’ll stop at nothing to tear down our President, tear down our law enforcement, and tear down statues of great American heroes like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln.
This is a disgrace – and we need to do something about it. [**STAND UP AGAINST THE DEMS AND THE MAINSTREAM MEDIA**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=708d0779ef6e426fb5ca672086573e9d&_e=7fMLLXcz9lbL-FdeJLuoo390LGf8ID5NVFbFulNMm1OAeC1VmZrPcfq-3Bovg3VW5l1TDCVhTa-Ewafroa3_SPEDConMMmGYR3oobPHZQ18-9SSKFMOFl-nOPDbe8w_t9UfvYaj7KIZGVU4QmNBXzFY3Vq6kTIuXvlCi85nX_WafrObvycTVcvmSw2lslE-uUjQJC0tyyWpSBKrT0MPTqtKE7Kf51qD7jFIMu3LQAqOQzCEbUFxqvNyK9bDt0xWX1OjAnZfrTS3tG5ztcdWUX8oK1DNlTpdGB9jyFHrL86-M_LtfPCnRymRqB2GkazU7ouH_GAlvKPKsZiWYT-_hyN7sbpAI9TgKFgn7BkiVa5WWERBIFBMnCEVQv9fTD2bleAEgRe0Ja0bCB1R8TipVEzSZomAnZW3gc3ckHRmBfPg%3D) President Trump and Republicans in Congress are leading the charge on police reform, economic recovery, and national security while Democrats do what they do best – **obstruct!**
_You’ll never hear about that on CNN._
**Instead, you’ll hear them discuss how President Trump drinks water during a speech because they want to distract America from what’s really going on in order to help the Democrats win in 2020.** [**STAND UP AGAINST THE DEMS AND THE MAINSTREAM MEDIA**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=708d0779ef6e426fb5ca672086573e9d&_e=7fMLLXcz9lbL-FdeJLuoo390LGf8ID5NVFbFulNMm1OAeC1VmZrPcfq-3Bovg3VW5l1TDCVhTa-Ewafroa3_SPEDConMMmGYR3oobPHZQ18-9SSKFMOFl-nOPDbe8w_t9UfvYaj7KIZGVU4QmNBXzFY3Vq6kTIuXvlCi85nX_WafrObvycTVcvmSw2lslE-uUjQJC0tyyWpSBKrT0MPTqgojEN6k_DK5RCCvCFnHpR20aPUGq_5nK2PD_ktzk0DmT4hEghWj4Iym7viJv-iTrT1YStqHsLMvtlhuSxWhev_2iYmaJAvsiSKRfeEJPVCdzno9laCI1dyTm3NqFnzXerTd_dygVZK87-CAfenjZM4NBgD4vIH0sFrgF3JI42gt1yUeVIYc0KqJU2km4JovXDdyxAaCQlloAvh9pnty3w0%3D) Democrats are afraid of losing the House this year, and they’re turned to their friends in the mainstream media to protect their majority.
That’s why I’m turning to you, friend.
Our quarterly fundraising deadline is coming up on **June 30th,** and I’m looking for Hoosiers like you to join me in the fight to flip the House this year so we can finally deliver common-sense healthcare reforms, fortify vulnerable parts of our border, and get our economy booming again.
[**Chip in $10, $25, or $50, or any amount to stand up against the Dems and their friends in the mainstream media and help me flip the House from Blue to Red this year >>>**](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=708d0779ef6e426fb5ca672086573e9d&_e=7fMLLXcz9lbL-FdeJLuoo390LGf8ID5NVFbFulNMm1OAeC1VmZrPcfq-3Bovg3VW5l1TDCVhTa-Ewafroa3_SPEDConMMmGYR3oobPHZQ18-9SSKFMOFl-nOPDbe8w_t9UfvYaj7KIZGVU4QmNBXzFY3Vq6kTIuXvlCi85nX_WafrObvycTVcvmSw2lslE-uUjQJC0tyyWpSBKrT0MPTqv9LodCI-Njco84JvRxrHkajmjimK6Ab62IqGbP7fKV9ffyKD6a7im0dHQeAR7YfBrLQyVKs2Je_xiq_yTAMR80imVQuqhj0o6P8jVTki57C4FHuEEekOJwBHmJh0dja62cDJTGFaLb9PJld6pqXIgSKpz801xWViHbw_Ds1S741Y3yK5T1kN4fDTAfimSFw7Hr_jzItcKGQ7GQiuSnTJQ4%3D)
Thank you, Greg Pence |

Federal election law requires political committees to use best efforts to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 during an election cycle. An individual may not contribute more than a total of $2,800 (maximum for Primary Election) per election to the committee. Federal law prohibits contributions to the committee from the general treasury funds of a corporation, labor organizations or national banks (including corporate or other business entity credit cards), from any person contributing another’s funds, from a Federal government contractor, or from a foreign national who lacks permanent resident status.

name: Bill Olson
subject: We have a problem
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army
body:
