name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Defending American history from the mob
body:
For more than a month, there has been a sustained assault on American civilians, law enforcement officers, public and private property. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e09f314c65&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 29, 2020
---
| | |
# President Trump will protect American history

**For more than a month,** there has been a sustained assault on American civilians, law enforcement officers, public and private property, and national treasures such as the Lincoln Memorial. These attacks aren’t the actions of peaceful protesters—they are the violent criminal acts of rioters, arsonists, anarchists, and left-wing extremists.

**On Friday** , President Trump signed [an executive order](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f33aead53a&e=3ee4985eea) to protect America’s monuments, memorials, and statues from those who seek to erase our history.

**“They’re tearing down** statues, desecrating monuments, and purging dissenters,” the President said. “It’s not the behavior of a peaceful political movement; it’s the behavior of totalitarians and tyrants and people that don’t love our country.”

**Under the new order,** any person who causes willful damage to federal property will be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law. President Trump will not tolerate violence and intimidation from a mob to impose its fringe ideology on law-abiding citizens.

🎬 [Press Sec: “Anarchy in our streets is unacceptable, and anger is not enough.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89be9e126d&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump’s** latest action also allows federal support to be withheld from state and local law enforcement agencies who fail to protect such monuments and memorials.

**It is the sacred **first duty of America’s leaders—federal, state, and local—to ensure domestic tranquility and defend the life, property, and rights of our citizens. In a letter to Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker and Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot on Friday, President Trump offered a partnership to end the violence in Chicago and bring about real change.

**“If you are willing** to put partisanship aside,” the President wrote, “we can revitalize distressed neighborhoods in Chicago, together. But to succeed, you must establish law and order.”

**Across our country, **provocateurs who are ignorant of American history are attempting to rewrite it. Some politicians hope to appease this mob by negotiating with the extremists who are destroying their communities and even [**claiming entire city blocks**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6e1bdfc450&e=3ee4985eea).

**President Trump** is standing up to these anarchists. Peaceful protesters deserve to be heard. Violent rioters deserve to be arrested. Real leaders can tell the difference.

[Read President Trump’s letter on the violence in Chicago.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=39e3f228ea&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [Administration takes action to protect America’s history from the mobs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d4830c0b8b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **‘Our moral obligation is to the American workers’**

**President Trump signed** two executive orders on Friday at the sixth meeting of the American Workforce Policy Advisory Board, a committee co-chaired by Ivanka Trump and Commerce Secretary Wilbur Ross.

**The first order** directs federal agencies to replace one-size-fits-all, degree-based hiring with skills-based hiring. Unnecessary degree requirements exclude otherwise qualified Americans from federal employment, impose the expense of college on prospective workers, and disproportionately harm low-income Americans.

**The second order** continues President Trump’s National Council for the American Worker through at least next September.

**The President’s** Pledge to America’s Workers has been signed by more than 400 companies and organizations. Together, these employers have pledged career training and development opportunities for over 16 million American workers—and counting.

🎬 [Ivanka Trump: This President is leading by example](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13ae965174&e=3ee4985eea)

**Learn more** : [Putting skills before degrees in federal hiring](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=26c98e3d3f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump signs an Executive Order on Protecting American Monuments, Memorials, and Statues and Combating Recent Criminal Violence** | June 26, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=878cb47711&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a10729e261&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8b31982458)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Moms=20in=20Office?=
subject: This is Our Last Day
body:
Hitting our goal tomorrow would mean we have the resources to keep fighting until November. | | | |
---
|
# The FEC Deadline is tomorrow.
---
| | |
---
| |
> "I founded Moms in Office to remove the barriers that keep so many women from becoming the policymakers we need today."
---
| [Chip in](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=a64e1659e4&e=3f151f8b74 "Chip in")
---
|
### **I am asking- **

We only have 24 hours to go until our FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow, but we are still working hard to hit our goal.

Hitting our goal would mean we have the resources we need to continue our work supporting candidates up and down the ballot who will fight for single moms like me and for all working families.

But meeting this goal would only be possible if supporters like you [chipped](https://momsinoffice.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fb9d4118fda0058c977d045ec&id=aad4e4b56c&e=3f151f8b74) in to emails like this one.

So, I am asking: If you are in a position where you can contribute, can I count on you to make a donation before tomorrow's deadline at midnight?

We have $2,759 to go. If everyone who opens this email would chip in just a few dollars, we could meet and exceed our goal tomorrow.

I am so grateful for your support.

Simona Grace
Founder, Moms in Office

---

subject: INVITE: Election Night Party
body:
Would you join us? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2c71caa39cf8/calling-all-patriots-12548198?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a0366641f9&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [RSVP: Election Night Party](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8ba696e7af&e=795c6d9796 "RSVP: Election Night Party")
---
| Peter, **As you likely know, tomorrow is Election Day!**

Needless to say, we have much work to do getting out every last vote we can until the polls close.

There's a lot at stake and we must elect Janet to stand with Trump, build the wall, put America First -- FIRE Liberal Kendra Horn. [Please vote and remind a few friends!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=33551bea57&e=795c6d9796)

But meantime, I wanted to make sure you get the invitation for our [Election Night Victory Party](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=81f02e4eda&e=795c6d9796) so you can make plans after the polls close.

We'll be at Clark Crew BBQ in Oklahoma City starting at 7:00 pm tomorrow when the polls close. [Please RSVP here](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=18b90fdf9e&e=795c6d9796) or reply to this email.

Thanks so much and hope to see you then!

On to Victory,
Sean Rose
Team Janet

P.S. [Be sure to VOTE tomorrow if you haven't yet and remind a few friends!](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9c7f1ece92&e=795c6d9796)
---
